golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating standard URLs with or without protocols, including basic syntax and structure.

golden_categories.name: Custom Protocols and Schemes
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with custom or non-standard protocols and schemes.

golden_categories.name: Underscores and Trailing Dots
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores or trailing dots in the domain.

golden_categories.name: Port Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific port requirements or formats.

golden_categories.name: Protocol and Fragment Options
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific protocol, fragment, or query component requirements.

golden_categories.name: Authentication in URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with or without authentication information.

golden_categories.name: Host and Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific host and domain requirements, including whitelists and blacklists.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Checks
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs against potential security vulnerabilities or malicious patterns.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs based on their length, including maximum length configurations.

generated_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests basic URL validation rules, including default behavior and hostname validation.

generated_categories.name: Length and Format Constraints
generated_categories.description: Tests constraints related to URL length and specific format requirements.

generated_categories.name: Fragment and Query Component Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests handling of fragments and query components based on options.

generated_categories.name: Authentication Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests rejection of URLs containing authentication components, including encoded authentication.

generated_categories.name: Protocol Requirements
generated_categories.description: Tests handling of protocol-related constraints, including protocol validation and protocol-relative URLs.

generated_categories.name: Port Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests handling of port-related constraints, including required ports and invalid port numbers.

generated_categories.name: Hostname and Host Requirements
generated_categories.description: Tests constraints related to hostname validation and host requirements.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on basic URL validation, including syntax and hostname validation.

No generated category specifically addresses underscores or trailing dots in domains.
Both categories focus on port validation, including required ports and invalid port numbers.
Generated category addresses fragments and query components, but does not fully cover protocol and fragment options.
Both categories focus on authentication in URLs, including rejection of authentication components.
Both categories address hostname and host requirements, including validation constraints.
No generated category specifically addresses security and vulnerability checks for URLs.
Generated category addresses length constraints but does not fully cover maximum length configurations.

generated_to_golden.reason: Generated category aligns with basic URL validation in the golden category.

Generated category aligns with custom protocols and schemes in the golden category.
